name: Maple Syrup Pie
recipeInstructions: Boil the maple syrup and 1/2 cup of water for 5 minutes. Blend the cornstarch with the 2 tablespoons of cold water and add to the syrup mixture. Cook, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth and transparent. Add butter and chopped nuts, then let it cool completely. Place between two crusts in an oven preheated to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 25-30 minutes.
